en_title: Silent Hill: Townfall Continues To Revitalize the Series in New, Horrifying Ways | IGN Preview
cn_title: 《寂静岭：城镇陨落》预览：系列复兴又添恐怖新作
subtitle: 雾里听见信号
opus_summary: 《寂静岭：城镇陨落》把舞台放在苏格兰港口小镇圣阿米莉亚，玩家用CRTV追踪信号、解谜和潜行。IGN看过演示后认为它抓住了系列恐怖气质。

paragraphs.en: Silent Hill has been going through a sort of revitalization in recent years. After leaving it dormant for far too long, Konami is finally doing what I'd like to see with more legacy series – letting talented external studios take a shot with their vision of what the series could be while having creative freedom. While Bloober Team did a faithful (and fantastic) remake of Silent Hill 2, NeoBards and writer Ryukishi07 made something truly special with Silent Hill f, which was an original story that was true to the series' core tenets. Sure, there have been absolute misses like the laughably bad movie adaption and a spinoff game in The Short Message, but hey, at least ideas are being thrown out there. However, I'm happy to report we might just have another banger on our hands with the latest example of the franchise’s revival: Silent Hill: Townfall. I only saw a hands-off gameplay walkthrough this time, but now I know that it's tapping into the style of horror we know to be Silent Hill with the tension of a slow-paced first-person thriller.
paragraphs.cn: 近几年，《寂静岭》正在经历某种复兴。在让它沉寂太久之后，Konami终于做了我希望更多老牌系列也能做的事：让有才华的外部工作室带着各自对这个系列可能性的理解来尝试，并给予创作自由。Bloober Team忠实而出色地重制了《寂静岭2》，NeoBards和作家龙骑士07则做出了真正特别的《寂静岭f》，它是一个原创故事，又忠于系列的核心原则。当然，也有像那部可笑糟糕的电影改编，以及《The Short Message》这类衍生游戏一样彻底失手的作品，但至少新想法正在被抛出来。不过，我很高兴地说，作为系列复兴的最新例子，《寂静岭：城镇陨落》可能又会是一部佳作。这次我只看了一段非实机操作的玩法演示，但我现在知道，它正在利用我们熟悉的《寂静岭》式恐怖，并加入慢节奏第一人称惊悚游戏的紧张感。

paragraphs.en: Townfall takes place in a port town called St. Amelia in Scotland, which is the home country of developer Screen Burn. The team was formerly known as No Code and made a splash with the eerie space adventure game Observation, and it seems that it's taking its horror-tinged strengths, applying them to Silent Hill, and also drawing from its own real-world inspirations. As expected, Townfall drops you in without much explanation and asks you to piece it together as you go along. You play as Simon Ordell, who I'm not even sure what he's doing in the St. Amelia cobblestone streets, covered in a fog denser than what Scotland's coastal community of St. Monans would normally face.
paragraphs.cn: 《城镇陨落》的舞台是一座名叫圣阿米莉亚的苏格兰港口小镇，而苏格兰正是开发商Screen Burn的所在地。这个团队此前名为No Code，曾凭诡异的太空冒险游戏《Observation》打出名声。现在看来，它正把自己带有恐怖色彩的长处用于《寂静岭》，同时也从现实世界汲取灵感。不出所料，《城镇陨落》几乎不给你多少解释就把你丢进去，并要求你边走边拼出真相。你扮演Simon Ordell，至于他到底为什么会出现在圣阿米莉亚的鹅卵石街道上，我甚至还不确定。那里被浓雾覆盖，雾比苏格兰海岸社区圣莫南斯平常面对的还要浓。

paragraphs.en: One of the games Silent Hill: Townfall's director Jon McKellan previously worked on was Alien Isolation, and it shows. Yes, there is combat in Townfall, but it is a very dangerous endeavor and a last ditch effort if you're caught by the town's deranged, grotesquely transformed humans. From what I saw, he only has a small complement of melee weapons, one of which is just a wooden plank wrapped in barbed wire. Townfall heavily emphasizes stealth, and it appears better for it – especially if it's drawing from Alien Isolation.
paragraphs.cn: 《寂静岭：城镇陨落》总监Jon McKellan此前参与过的游戏之一是《异形：隔离》，这一点很明显。是的，《城镇陨落》中有战斗，但那是非常危险的行动，只有在你被镇上那些疯狂、畸形的人类抓住时，才算最后一搏。从我看到的内容来看，他只有少量近战武器，其中一件不过是缠着带刺铁丝的木板。《城镇陨落》高度强调潜行，而它似乎也因此更好，尤其是如果它确实在借鉴《异形：隔离》的话。

paragraphs.en: The key here is Simon has what's called a CRTV, a handheld radio with a screen that also visualizes incoming signals. A big part of what you'll be doing gameplay-wise is tuning the CRTV to figure out where to go, find solutions for puzzles, and track enemy movement through walls. It's not as easy as hitting a button to scan your surroundings; rather, the CRTV must be directed toward them and you have to pay attention to the little screen on it as it works like an ultrasound. I watched the demoist follow the enemy patrol pattern around the corner of a building to then time their movement to dash safely in order to progress.
paragraphs.cn: 关键在于Simon拥有一个名为CRTV的设备，这是一台带屏幕的手持收音机，也能把接收到的信号可视化。玩法中很大一部分，是调节CRTV来弄清该去哪里、寻找谜题解法，并隔着墙追踪敌人移动。这不是按一个按钮扫描周围那么简单；相反，你必须把CRTV对准目标，并在它像超声波一样工作时注意那块小屏幕。我看到演示者通过它追踪建筑拐角处的敌人巡逻路线，然后抓准时机安全冲过去继续前进。

paragraphs.en: It's a neat and clever way to make the core gameplay diegetic, giving you a more intimate way of engaging with the world itself while fitting into a story that takes place in 1996. For example, tuning the signal will feed you images of where you're supposed to go and you have to really pay attention to the environment. Are you looking at the right building, going through the right alleyway, or banging on the right door? All that is shown in static images on the CRTV as seen in the live demo. I think it adds to the tension and atmosphere when you have to rely on an in-game tool's function instead of having a HUD or markers; it’s a sensible approach for Silent Hill's brand of horror.
paragraphs.cn: 这是一种巧妙又聪明的方式，让核心玩法变成世界内部自洽的一部分。它让你以更亲密的方式参与这个世界，同时也契合发生在1996年的故事。比如，调节信号会给你显示你应该前往的地点画面，你必须真正注意环境。你看的是正确的建筑吗？走的是正确的小巷吗？敲的是正确的门吗？正如现场演示所见，这一切都会以静态图像显示在CRTV上。我认为，当你必须依靠游戏内工具的功能，而不是依靠HUD或标记时，紧张感和氛围会被加强；这对《寂静岭》式恐怖来说是合理的做法。

paragraphs.en: Stealthing your way through terrifying situations and piecing together clues about where to go is only part of the deal. As with other Silent Hill games, there's a deeper mystery that deals in subtleties, and all we really know so far is that Simon’s investigating the past to figure why St. Amelia has been completely abandoned. The hints lead him to the house of a nurse named Zoe Ellis, who initially contacts Simon through the CRTV, and here is where Townfall goes into more of an exploration/adventure style of game where you're carefully inspecting your surroundings – reading notes left behind, digging through cabinets and drawers, going through files on a DOS-based PC, listening to old phone messages, etc. And if you're stuck, instead of being shown what you need to do directly or having Simon talk to himself to give hints to the player, he'll have thought bubbles off to the side to both show what he's thinking and perhaps give you the nudge you'd otherwise need.
paragraphs.cn: 潜行穿过可怕处境，并拼凑关于去向的线索，只是其中一部分。和其他《寂静岭》游戏一样，这里还有一个处理微妙细节的更深层谜团。目前我们真正知道的是，Simon正在调查过去，以弄清圣阿米莉亚为何已经彻底被遗弃。线索把他带到一名叫Zoe Ellis的护士家中，而Zoe最初通过CRTV联系Simon。到了这里，《城镇陨落》会更接近探索/冒险式游戏，你要仔细检查周围环境：阅读留下的笔记，翻找橱柜和抽屉，查看一台基于DOS的PC上的文件，收听旧电话留言等等。如果你卡住了，游戏不会直接告诉你该做什么，也不会让Simon自言自语给玩家提示，而是会在旁边出现思维气泡，既显示他在想什么，也可能给你一点本来需要的推动。

paragraphs.en: This was a brief demo, so the more horrifying elements and headier puzzles are still under wraps – and I can only imagine how terrifying it'll be to explore the town when the skies turn a blinding red, as shown in previous trailers. I'm still curious about what all the dropped protest signs in the town square imply about St. Amelia's demise; it's easy to theorize that either a corporation or governing body overran the townsfolk for an initiative that had a grave impact on their environment. Maybe the IV stuck in Simon's arm the entire time, and the fact that Zoe's a nurse, foreshadows where this seemingly sad story is headed.
paragraphs.cn: 这次演示很短，所以更恐怖的元素和更烧脑的谜题仍被藏着。至于此前预告片中展现过的天空变成刺眼红色时探索小镇会有多可怕，我只能想象。我仍然好奇，小镇广场上那些被丢下的抗议标语到底暗示了圣阿米莉亚的毁灭原因。很容易推测，可能是一家公司或管理机构为了某个项目压过了镇民，而这个项目对当地环境造成了严重影响。也许Simon手臂上始终插着的静脉输液针，以及Zoe是一名护士这一事实，正在预示这个似乎悲伤的故事会走向何处。

paragraphs.en: This is the kind of storytelling Silent Hill has historically done extremely well, and seeing it played as a more tempered first-person horror-adventure has me as intrigued as when I first saw Silent Hill f before its release. We won't have to wait long, since Silent Hill: Townfall is set to launch on September 24 for PlayStation 5 and PC.
paragraphs.cn: 这正是《寂静岭》历来非常擅长的讲故事方式。看到它以更克制的第一人称恐怖冒险形式展开，让我产生了和当初在《寂静岭f》发售前第一次看到它时一样的兴趣。我们不用等太久，因为《寂静岭：城镇陨落》定于9月24日登陆PlayStation 5和PC。

paragraphs.en: Michael Higham is an editor at IGN who regularly contributes with reviews, previews, features, and news in written and video form. He's usually entrusted with covering long RPGs and tech products, but he's got range when it comes to games. You'll also catch him at events and hosting video content, including IGN's weekly podcast Unlocked .
paragraphs.cn: Michael Higham是IGN编辑，经常以文字和视频形式参与评测、预览、专题和新闻。他通常负责长篇RPG和科技产品，但在游戏方面涉猎很广。你也会在活动现场和视频节目主持中看到他，包括IGN每周播客Unlocked。
